roa.docketEntryComment: Order Designating Arrest as Detention Only Pursuant to Penal Code 849.5 - ORDER TO DEEM RECORD OF ARREST DETENTION ONLY ( PENAL CODE 849.5)
DEF PET TO SEAL ARREST RECORDS PC 849,5 AND PC 851,92

/CAL  PETITION TO DEEM RECORD OF ARREST DETENTION ONLY AND TO SEAL RECORDPC849,5 AND PC851,92/NP/X: NOT REPORTED/X: DEFENSE WITHDRAWS PC851,92 MOTION,/X: DEFENDANT'S PC849,5 MOTION:/X: INCIDENT DATE 02-08-22/CTORD: SAN FRANCISCO POLICE REPORT INCIDENT NUMBER 220-088-898 DATED  02-08-22 IS DEEMED A DETENTION ONLY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 849,5/CTORD: THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT AND THE ATTORNEY GENERAL SHALL REQUEST THE DELETION OFANY REFERENCE TO AN ARREST IN ANY ARREST RECORDS WHICH THEY HAVE GIVEN TO ANY LOCAL, STATE OR FEDERAL AGENCY WITHIN THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA SHALL DEEMTHIS ACTION A DETENTION ONLY,/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,
